headlines.title: FBI has seized more than 600 drones near World Cup events
headlines.description: The FBI said it has seized more than 600 drones near World Cup sites since the tournament began on June 11 after authorities determined the devices violated restricted airspace.

headlines.title: Trump uses America’s 250 speech to honor military heroes and also push political agendas
headlines.description: President Trump concluded the semiquincentennial celebration by reflecting on the nation's history, honoring veterans and pushing his political agenda during his address at the Salute to America event. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports on key points from the president's speech.

headlines.title: Record heat suspected in over 20 deaths as severe weather dampens festivities
headlines.description: Record-setting heat is suspected in 25 deaths from the Deep South to the Midwest to the East Coast, authorities said, with the temperature highs also suppressing some Fourth of July celebrations.

headlines.title: Trump touts SAVE America Act during Salute to America 250 speech
headlines.description: President Trump highlighted the potential approval of the SAVE America Act during his Salute to America 250 speech, stating his goal to require photo identification to vote and limit the use of mail-in ballots.

headlines.title: Flock's A.I.-enabled street cameras see backlash as more communities cancel contracts
headlines.description: Activists are speaking out against new, A.I.-enabled cameras being used by municipalities across the country. Critics argue the technology is creating a mass surveillance network that can be accessed by federal immigration agencies. NBC News' Dana Griffin reports.

headlines.title: AI is helping families reunite with their beloved missing pets
headlines.description: Every year, thousands of pets go missing on July Fourth. But, the non-profit Petco Love Lost says their patented AI database has helped over 250,000 pets get reunited with their families for free. NBC News' Marquise Francis reports.

headlines.title: Buying Refurbished Tech? Avoid These Major Mistakes
headlines.description: Buying refurbished and second-hand items can save you some money but is it a safe investment? NBC’s Brian Cheung joins TODAY to share important do’s and don’ts and how to avoid being scammed.

headlines.title: AI-powered robots are new tech searching ocean floors for mines
headlines.description: An exclusive look at Greensea IQ's AI-powered robots that can find and clear mines on the ocean floor. A powerful new tool that minimizes the human risk of deactivating these deadly hazards. NBC News' Brian Cheung reports.

headlines.title: South Korea sees new dopamine trend in digital window shopping
headlines.description: South Korea is seeing a new trend in websites people are using to create dopamine by digital window shopping. NBC News' Dr. Akshay Syal talks more about the benefits and drawbacks of using it.

headlines.title: Inside the new space shuttle ‘Endeavour’ exhibit at California Science Center
headlines.description: NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz previews the new exhibit at the California Science Center, where visitors will soon be able to view NASA’s space shuttle Endeavour in its ready-to-launch position.

headlines.title: A.I. takes center stage in health topics discussed at the Aspen Ideas festival
headlines.description: Right now, some of the world's brightest leaders, scholars and artists are in Colorado for the Aspen Ideas festival. NBC News’ Kate Snow went to discuss how A.I. Is reshaping the classroom and how we manage our health.

headlines.title: Struggling to Focus? Here's How to Train Your Attention Span
headlines.description: In a world of constant distractions, it can be difficult to stay focused, so psychotherapist Niro Feliciano joins TODAY with tips on how to train your attention span. She advises setting time blocks, creating phone-free zones and touts the benefits of making lists.
